prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of Mastercard (MA) stock, which typically exhibits annualized volatility around 25-30%. For a 20-day forecast, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with assumed drift of 8% annually and volatility of 27%. The point estimate reflects modest upward momentum typical of established payment processors. Confidence intervals widen significantly due to inherent market uncertainty over 20-day periods, with the 90% CI spanning approximately ±5.7% from the point estimate.
